tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall ssl-ssh-profile
edit "custom-deep-inspection"
config https
set ports 443 8443
end
next
end

config dlp sensor
edit "Egress_DLP_Sensor"
set comment "Apply upload logging and post summary for egress"
set summary-proto http-post
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 3
set dlp-sensor "Egress_DLP_Sensor"
next
end

show firewall ssl-ssh-profile
show dlp sensor
show firewall policy"}

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall ssl-ssh-profile
config firewall ssl-ssh-profile
    edit "deep-inspection"
        set comment "Read-only deep inspection profile."
        config https
            set ports 443
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config ftps
            set ports 990
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config imaps
            set ports 993
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config pop3s
            set ports 995
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config smtps
            set ports 465
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config ssh
set ports 22
            set status disable
        end
        config dot
            set status disable
        end
        config ssl-exempt
            edit 1
                set fortiguard-category 31
            next
            edit 2
                set fortiguard-category 33
            next
            edit 3
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "adobe"
            next
            edit 4
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "Adobe Login"
            next
            edit 5

next

    edit "no-inspection"
        set comment "Read-only profile that does no inspection."
        config https
            set status disable
        end
        config ftps
            set status disable
        end
        config imaps
            set status disable
        end
        config pop3s
            set status disable
        end
        config smtps
            set status disable
        end
        config ssh
            set ports 22
set status disable
        end
        config dot
            set status disable
        end
    next
    edit "certificate-inspection"
        set comment "Read-only SSL handshake inspection profile."
        config https
            set ports 443
            set status certificate-inspection

        config ftps
            set status disable
        end
        config imaps
            set status disable
        end
        config pop3s
            set status disable

        config smtps
            set status disable
        end
config ssh

            set status disable

        config dot
            set status disable

end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show dlp sensor
config dlp sensor
    edit "default"
        set comment "Default sensor."
    next
    edit "sniffer-profile"
        set comment "Log a summary of email and web traffic."
        set summary-proto smtp pop3 imap http-get http-post
    next
    edit "Egress_DLP_Sensor"
        set comment "Apply upload logging and post summary for egress"
        set summary-proto http-post
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Deny_C2_HTTPS_8443"
        set uuid d4653364-291c-51f1-4e68-2508b12a5ab4
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "C2_Attacker"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "TCP_8443"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 3
        set name "Allow_Egress_With_SSL_Inspection"
        set uuid d479fe2a-291c-51f1-b060-a503199dba31
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set ssl-ssh-profile "custom-deep-inspection"
        set logtraffic all
set nat enable
        set comments "Apply deep inspection for egress and DLP enforcement"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
